ead.archdesc:
======= RMA03027Cornell Fraternity and Sorority Affairs Office records37-4-3027Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
August 20182B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:

This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell Fraternity and Sorority Affairs Office records
Cornell University. Fraternity and Sorority Affairs Office
37-4-3027
2.5 cubic feet. 2.5 cubic feet.
1960-2009. Scrapbooks, photographs, correspondence, rush books, bylaws, annual reports, newsletters, newspaper clippings, pamphlets, and ephemera. Includes scrapbooks, photographs, correspondence, rush books, bylaws, annual reports, newsletters, newspaper clippings, pamphlets, and ephemera of fraternities and sororities at Cornell University. Also, t-shirt from Cornell Greek Week, 2003. Annual reports from the Fraternity and Sorority Advisory Council, 1997-2009; Guide and Map of the Fraternities & Sororities, 2003-2009; and brochures. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD unprocessed ======= unprocessed >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 3539585
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
August 2018
EAD encoding:
Marcie Farwell, August 2018
Date modified:
RMC Staff, August 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes scrapbooks, photographs, correspondence, rush books, bylaws, annual reports, newsletters, newspaper clippings, pamphlets, and ephemera of fraternities and sororities at Cornell University. Also, t-shirt from Cornell Greek Week, 2003.
Annual reports from the Fraternity and Sorority Advisory Council, 1997-2009; Guide and Map of the Fraternities & Sororities, 2003-2009; and brochures.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Fraternity and Sorority Affairs records
Cite As:
Fraternity and Sorority Affairs Office Records, #37/4/3027. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Bylaws (administrative records) Scrapbooks. Photographs. Women college students. Greek letter societies. Cornell University -- : Students. Cornell University -- : Societies, etc. Cornell University. Fraternity and Sorority Advisory Council
3539585 <<<<<<< HEAD Fraternity and Sorority Affairs recordsNYSFDA Regional Fraternity Deans and IFC Presidential Conference correspondence1972-197411Association of Fraternity Advisors Conference materials; Dr. Tom Fiutak correspondence and notes1976-197712
Scope and Contents
Also contains notes and conference materials from 1976 National Interfraternity Council meeting of the Board of DirectorsProfessional Association journals1969-197013
Scope and Contents
Journals and newsletters relating to counseling and guidanceNortheast Regional Inter Fraternity Conference materials and attendee worksheets197814World's Largest Lasagna Fest permits and plans, correspondence, invoices1991-199215Cornell Day correspondence1961-196716"A History of the Cornell University Housing Plans - 1890-1971" by David B. HendersonUndated17
Scope and Contents
Also contains "Black Hats and White Hats: Polarization on the Campus" by David Henderson, dated 6 March 1970Correspondence regarding Chi Phi house renovation and expenses1966-197318Correspodence regarding Chi Phi entrance to Cornell University Residence Plan; also contains correspondence regarding Psi Upsilon suspension1968-197819
Scope and Contents
Also contains minutes of Chi Phi Chapter House Association annual meeting, 1968 and 1969House President Meeting materials (1970); correspondence with house presidents (1975-1977)1970110
Scope and Contents
Also contains Cesar Chavez letter requesting donations to Farm Workers Union, flyer on wines to boycott, and photocopies of New York Times articles regarding ChavezStatements of fraternities' compliance with Saperston Report recommendation 5 regarding membership selection policy1969-1971111
Scope and Contents
Also contains 1971 letter regarding Theta Delta Chi house fire hazardsAnti-discrimination materials1973112
Scope and Contents
Reports on 1966 Saperston Report and Recommendation 5; statements of fraternities' compliance with anti-discrimination policies; 1961 newspaper articles regarding Executive Board votes on anti-discrimination policiesMaterials and correspondence regarding implementation of and revisions to Saperston Report Recommendation 5 on non-discrimination policies in fraternaties and sororities1968113Materials and correspondence regarding implementation of and revisions to Saperston Report Recommendation 5 on non-discrimination policies in fraternaties and sororities1960-1984114
Scope and Contents
Contains some documentation on anti-discrimination policies at other universities
Processing Information
Previously one overfilled folder; divided in twoMaterials and correspondence regarding implementation of and revisions to Saperston Report Recommendation 5 on non-discrimination policies in fraternaties and sororities1960-1984115
Scope and Contents
Contains some documentation on anti-discrimination policies at other universities
Processing Information
Previously one overfilled folder; divided in twoPost-commission correspondence1966-1968116Correspondence and draft documentation regarding implementation of Saperston Report Recommendation 51967-1968117Statements of fraternities' compliance with Recommendation 5 of the Report of the University Commission of Residential Environment1978118Cornell University Residence Plan documentation and correspondence1964-1975119
Scope and Contents
Contains minutes of meetings of the Faculty Committee on Student Affairs"Greek is the Word" Louisiana State University Panhellenic rush guide1978120National Panhellenic Conference Manual of InformationUndated121A. D. White Leadership Conference program2007122Miscellaneous fraternity and sorority photos1989-1991123
Scope and Contents
Includes slides, Greek Week 1989, 1990-1991 Panhellenic Council, and sorority house composit photo sheet, and undated photosOffice of Fraternity and Sorority Affairs newsletters2005124Greek system statistic sheets2005125Greek Fellows Mentoring Program, Greek Life, and Creating Chapters of Excellence brochuresUndated126Interfraternity Council newsletter1950-01-13127Janet Miller research on sorority pledge programs1964-196521
Scope and Contents
Janet Miller was a second-year student in the Master of Arts in Student Personnel Administration program in the 1964-1965 school year.Mark Barlow Jr. correspondence1966-196822
Scope and Contents
Mark Barlow was Vice President for Student Affairs and later Vice Provost. Contains a copy of the Sterling Forest report on residential environment.Mark Barlow Jr. correspondence196923
Scope and Contents
Mark Barlow was Vice President for Student Affairs and later Vice Provost.Sorority correspondence1963-197324Fraternity correspondence1973-197525Correspondence with national fraternity associations1973-197526
Scope and Contents
Much of the material relates to Title IX impact on fraternitiesFraternity judicial correspondence197527Interfraternity Council bylaws and violations1954-196328
Processing Information
Previously one over filled folder, now split in two.Interfraternity Council bylaws and violations1954-196329
Processing Information
Previously one over filled folder, now split in two.Fraternity policies1960-1965210
Scope and Contents
Contains research on history of fraternities, and copies of Muller ReportFraternity complaint reports1963-1971211Student Management Corporation1974212Fraternity rush1967-1978213Interfraternity Council1975214"Fraternity Newsletter;" National Interfraternity Conference "Campus Commentary"; Association of Fraternity Advisors correspondence1974-1977215Fraternity management1972-1974216
Scope and Contents
Includes budgets, information on fraternity tax filing, and reports of national and international leadershipSpecial reports on fraternities1950-1964217
Scope and Contents
Includes 1964 Report on Student-Faculty Relationships at Cornell, Butler study, Hacker report, Cornell Fraternity Self-Study Program, Muller report, 1950 Cornell Student QuestionnaireFraternity representatives and nationals correspondence1973218"Greek Columns" newspaper issues1980-1988219
Processing Information
Previously one over filled folder, now split in two."Greek Columns" newspaper issues1990220
Scope and Contents
Also includes Winter 1990 issue of "The Star and Lamp of Pi Kappa Phi" and August 1988 issue of "The Sigma Phi Epsilon Journal"
Processing Information
Previously one over filled folder, now split in two.Fraternity newspaper and magazine clippings1962-1966221
Scope and Contents
Includes 1963 Report on Fraternities at Cornell UniversityFraternity clippings from Cornell Daily Sun1950-1968222Correspondence and materials relating to establishment of Alpha Gamma Sigma fraternity at Cornell1967223
Scope and Contents
Includes 1967 Constitution of the Alpha Chapter of Alpha Gamma Sigma Professional Agricultural FraternityGreek Week t-shirt200331"Panhellenic Memories" scrapbook1994-199632Unidentified photographs of people and buildingsUndated33Cornell Interfraternity Council webcrawl
